source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/■ 3. 3차 CE TCF 보안사항 제출 (12월10일)/11. Mechanical and Electronic Drawing/A-TCF-5-017_Mechanical and Electronic Drawing_200303.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Mechanical and electronic drawing document for HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG digital flat panel X-ray detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides schematic, Gerber, and mechanical drawing version references for the detector models.
keyPoints: Prepared, reviewed, and approved on MAR/03/2020.
Revision 1 is described as correction of audit points.
Lists Main Board, ROIC Board, Gate Board, and Power Box Board schematic/Gerber versions.
Lists detector and power box mechanical drawing versions.

The document applies to Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models HAD1717MC and HAD1717MG.

evidence.claim: The report number and revision are A-TCF-5-017 (Rev.1).
The document was prepared, reviewed, and approved on MAR/03/2020.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared R&D team Jung, Woo suk MAR/03/2020 Review R&D Manager Lee, Dong jin MAR/03/2020 Approval Quality Manager Hur Namkyu MAR/03/2020

evidence.claim: Revision 1 was dated MAR/03/2020 and described as correction of audit points.
The document overview states it is the Mechanical and Electronic Drawing of the HAD1717MG and HAD1717MC.
evidence.evidenceText: This document is Mechanical and Electronic Drawing of the HAD1717MG,HAD1717MC.

evidence.claim: The listed schematic and Gerber versions are Main Board V006, ROIC Board V007, Gate Board V006, and Power Box Board V006.
evidence.evidenceText: Main Board : V006 Roic Board : V007 Gate Board : V006 Power Box Board : V006

evidence.claim: The listed mechanical drawing versions are V0.0 for detector body frame, detector carbon plate frame, detector bottom plate frame, power box top cover, and power box bottom cover.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector Body Frame Drawing : V0.0 Detector Carbon Plate Frame Drawing : V0.0 Detector Bottom Plate Frame Drawing : V0.0 Power Box Top Cover Drawing : V0.0 Power Box Bottom Cover Drawing : V0.0
